name: gamedaywire
description: Your Daily Sports & Entertainment News Feed — Automated Programmatic SEO Blog Engine

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run start -w frontend" "npm run start -w backend"
scripts.cron:dry-run: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const job = process.argv[1]; if (!job) { console.error('Usage: npm run cron:dry-run -- <jobName>'); process.exit(1); } execSync('npx tsx cron/' + job + '.ts --dry-run', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/.next frontend/node_modules backend/dist backend/node_modules cron/node_modules node_modules
